variants: Caraline Duval is currently a resident of Highpetal Summit, where her expertise in Korean Hangul shines at Quarry Lake Ventures. Originally from Gingerbark Fields, she cultivated her artistic talents while attending Pineforge College of Art. Her academic background laid the groundwork for her professional endeavors. Today, Caraline is proud of how her roots inform her work and contribute to her success in the field.
